kanban_card: G19 - Gan Post-G16 Error Attribution Audit
reference_policy: reference[0] is a secondary cross-check and difficulty signal, not benchmark gold.

g8_special_class_selector.failure_label: Target selection chooses seizure-free over quantified evidence
g8_special_class_selector.recommended_resolution: Needs a new target-selection mechanism over closed-option rows; do not rerun G8/G10/G15 prompt shapes.

g8_special_class_selector.failure_label: Frequency-content gate or unclear-frequency policy misroutes unclear/cluster evidence as concrete
g8_special_class_selector.recommended_resolution: Route to G17 or a special-label mechanism: preserve unclear/cluster caveats and avoid forcing concrete rates.

optimization_queue.evidence: 16 arm-misses across 4 standard50 rows; gan_15997 and gan_16772 are missed by all five inspected arms.
optimization_queue.recommendation: Preregister exact answer-option construction and duration/rate fixture policy before implementing a constructor or rerunning exact closed-option selectors.

optimization_queue.next_card: G17 - Gan Unknown vs. No-Reference Policy Separation
optimization_queue.evidence: 15 unclear/cluster gate-policy arm-misses, 1 unknown-over-concrete miss, and 3 canonical-only scorer-discordant misses on seizure-free versus no-reference rows.
optimization_queue.recommendation: Scope G17 beyond a string distinction: include unclear-frequency, unknown-cluster, seizure-free/no-reference scorer discordance, and concrete-rate overcalls.

optimization_queue.next_card: New G-card - Closed-Option Target Selection Ledger
optimization_queue.evidence: 30 target-selection/cluster arm-misses occur where the current surface usually already contains the needed option or the needed cluster distinction.
optimization_queue.recommendation: Do not rerun G8/G10/G15 prompt shapes; preregister a narrower comparator over rows with exact candidates already available.

scorer_mode_caveats.standard50_crosstab_note: Canonical-only correct rows are benchmark-facing target-semantics caveats, not repair candidates.
